overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy walking through shallow turquoise coastal waters during a dramatic sunset. The character navigates rocky shallows, gets splashed by a wave, and walks along the beach toward the setting sun over the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shallows with incoming waves

events.description: large ocean wave crashes over the character creating a dramatic water splash

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through knee-deep clear turquoise water toward rocky outcrops ahead

entered.detail: transparent turquoise water with visible sandy bottom
large rocky outcrop formation jutting into the water ahead
sandy shoreline visible to the left of the frame
gentle ocean waves rolling in from the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through crystal-clear shallow coastal waters toward a rocky outcrop during golden hour. The sandy beach lines the left side while ocean swells approach from the right. At approximately 8 seconds, a large wave crashes over the character, creating a dramatic splash before receding.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested rocky coastline with misty waterfalls

events.description: moving from open shallows into area with dense pine trees and golden rocky formations

agents.ego_description: navigating through shallow pools and around rocks toward the forested tree line

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the shore
sunlit rocky formations with golden highlights in the water
waterfall cascading down rocks with visible mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the shallows approaching the forested coastline. Dense pine trees become visible on the left while golden-hued rocks emerge from the water. A misty waterfall appears in the background as the character navigates around the rocky formations, transitioning from open water to a more enclosed coastal inlet.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach at sunset with panoramic ocean view

events.description: camera pans to reveal dramatic purple and orange sunset sky over the ocean horizon
character turns left to walk parallel to shoreline facing the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge toward the sunset, observing the reflective ocean surface

entered.detail: vast open ocean stretching to the horizon with deep purple and orange sky
bright sun low on the horizon casting golden reflection across the water
purple and pink cumulus clouds illuminated by the sunset
large rock formation silhouetted against the sunset on the left

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the ocean at sunset. The character turns to walk along the shoreline as the camera reveals a dramatic sky filled with purple and pink clouds. The setting sun casts a brilliant golden path across the reflective water surface while distant rocky islands silhouette against the colorful horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through shallow coastal waters that gradually transitions from an open beach into a secluded inlet and finally opens onto a panoramic sunset vista. It begins with the character wading through crystal-clear turquoise water beside a sandy shore, where a large wave suddenly crashes over them in a dramatic splash. As the character continues forward, the environment shifts toward a forested coastline where dense pine trees and golden-hued rocks emerge, leading the way toward a misty waterfall in the background. The scene then expands from the enclosed inlet to a breathtaking view of the ocean, with the camera revealing a sky filled with purple and pink clouds. Finally, the character walks along the shoreline as the setting sun casts a brilliant golden path across the reflective water toward silhouetted rocky islands on the horizon.
